headline: Royal Caribbean and Affirm to bring flexible and transparent payment options to travellers in UK and Canada
summary: LONDON & TORONTO, May 20, 2026--UK and Canadian holidaymakers booking with Royal Caribbean can now spread the cost of their cruise over time without compounding interest or late fees, following a new partnership with payment network Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM).
